---
title: "Maclaurin and Taylor Series"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Maclaurin and Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/n2003/TaylorPolyMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 1

### Animation Portals

1. [Maclaurin and Taylor Polynomials](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Series.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 31

### Animation Items

1. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin01/Maclaurinaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin01/Maclaurinaa.gif
2. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin02/Maclaurinbb.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin02/Maclaurinbb.gif
3. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin03/Maclaurincc.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin03/Maclaurincc.gif
4. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin04/Maclaurindd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin04/Maclaurindd.gif
5. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin05/Maclaurinee.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin05/Maclaurinee.gif
6. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin06/Maclaurinff.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin06/Maclaurinff.gif
7. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin07/Maclauringg.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin07/Maclauringg.gif
8. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin08/Maclaurinhh.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin08/Maclaurinhh.gif
9. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin09/Maclaurinii.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin09/Maclaurinii.gif
10. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin10/Maclaurinjj.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin10/Maclaurinjj.gif
11. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin11/Maclaurinkk.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin11/Maclaurinkk.gif
12. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin12/Maclaurinll.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin12/Maclaurinll.gif
13. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin13/Maclaurinmm.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin13/Maclaurinmm.gif
14. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin14/Maclaurinnn.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin14/Maclaurinnn.gif
15. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin15/Maclaurinoo.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin15/Maclaurinoo.gif
16. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin16/Maclaurinpp.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin16/Maclaurinpp.gif
17. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin17/Maclaurinqq.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin17/Maclaurinqq.gif
18. [Maclaurin Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin18/Maclaurinrr.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Maclaurin18/Maclaurinrr.gif
19. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/OrdinaryDE/Taylor1/Tayloraa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/OrdinaryDE/Taylor1/Tayloraa.gif
20. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/OrdinaryDE/Taylor2/Taylorbb.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/OrdinaryDE/Taylor2/Taylorbb.gif
21. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor03/Taylorcc.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor03/Taylorcc.gif
22. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor04/Taylordd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor04/Taylordd.gif
23. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor05/Tayloree.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor05/Tayloree.gif
24. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor06/Taylorff.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor06/Taylorff.gif
25. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor07/Taylorgg.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor07/Taylorgg.gif
26. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor08/Taylorhh.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor08/Taylorhh.gif
27. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor09/Taylorii.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor09/Taylorii.gif
28. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor10/Taylorjj.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor10/Taylorjj.gif
29. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor11/Taylorkk.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor11/Taylorkk.gif
30. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor12/Taylorll.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor12/Taylorll.gif
31. [Taylor Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor13/Taylormm.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Series/Taylor13/Taylormm.gif
